agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

topic: public release of dual-use policy datasets

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
My view has not changed.

Strongest opponent point: Releasing dual-use policy datasets could compromise national security by providing sensitive information to potential adversaries.

Counterargument: The benefits of transparency and accountability outweigh the risks. Proper redaction and declassification procedures can mitigate security concerns while promoting trust and informed public discourse.

View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Rilis data kebijakan ganda dapat mengancam keamanan nasional dengan menyediakan informasi sensitif kepada pihak-pihak potensial yang berlawanan.

Counterargument saya: Manfaat transparansi dan akuntabilitas melebihi risiko. Prosedur pemotongan dan dekripsi yang tepat dapat mengurangi kekhawatiran keamanan sambil mempromosikan kepercayaan dan diskusi publik yang terinformasi.

Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:

Counterargument: The benefits of transparency and accountability outweigh the risks. Proper redaction and declassification procedures can mitigate security concerns while promoting trust and informed public discourse.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Rilis data kebijakan ganda dapat merugikan negara dengan menyediakan informasi rahasia kepada pihak-pihak yang tidak sah.

Counterargument saya: Selain mitigasi risiko melalui prosedur pemotongan dan dekripsi yang tepat, rilis ini juga bisa meningkatkan partisipasi publik dalam proses demokrasi.

Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.
